name: Apple Pecan Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Dried Oregano (or 4 tbsp Fresh Oregano)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a large stock pot.
2. Add the onions, scallions, green pepper, celery, apples, pecans, garlic, and turkey giblets to the pot. Stir in all spices and seasonings.
3. Cook over medium heat until the onions are translucent and fragrant.
4. Add the stuffing mix and stir until well combined.
5. Reduce heat and add chicken stock gradually, adjusting texture and consistency as needed.
6. Turn off the heat and allow the dressing to cool before stuffing the turkey. Stuff a 20 lb turkey.
